slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Clean infographic style. White background #FFFFFF. VERY GENEROUS outer margin on all four sides. Headline COMPACT two lines: 아기 체온 측정 navy, 부위별 정확한 기준 with 정확한 기준 underlined in teal #2C6E63. Small subtitle gray: 연령별 권장 방법 · AAP 가이드라인 기준. LARGE minimalist thermometer and baby line illustration in teal, prominently placed center-right. Generous bottom whitespace. No pixel values as text. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Clean infographic style. White background #FFFFFF. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top-right small: 소아과언니 navy, no quotes. Top-left small coral rounded label: 0-3개월. Headline COMPACT: 3개월 미만 영아는 navy, 직장 체온이 기준 with 직장 체온이 기준 teal #2C6E63 underline. Center-right: clean editorial illustration of rectal thermometer and baby, line art teal/navy minimal. Below headline: large rounded card light gray #F0F4F8 with GENEROUS padding. Inside card top: small icon thermometer teal. Bold navy large: 직장 체온 38℃ 이상 = 발열. Small navy text below: (100.4℉ 이상). Bottom of card coral small: 가장 정확한 측정 방법. Bottom thin teal divider. No pixel text on card. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Clean infographic style. White background #FFFFFF. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top-right small: 소아과언니 navy, no quotes. Top-left small teal rounded label: 직장 체온. Headline COMPACT: 올바른 직장 체온 navy, 측정 방법 with 측정 방법 teal underline. Center-left: minimalist illustration of thermometer with depth markers, line art teal. Right side: two stacked cards light gray #F0F4F8 GENEROUS padding. Top card: 6개월 미만 small gray + 1.3cm bold navy large + (0.5인치) small navy. Bottom card: 6개월 이상 small gray + 2.5cm bold navy large + (1인치) small navy. Bottom coral box rounded: ⚠️ 윤활제 사용 필수. Thin teal divider bottom. No pixel text. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Clean infographic style. White background #FFFFFF. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top-right small: 소아과언니 navy, no quotes. Top-left small teal rounded label: 겨드랑이. Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Clean infographic style. White background #FFFFFF. VERY GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 navy, no quotes. Top-center small gray: SAVE & SHARE. Generous spacing + thin horizontal divider navy. 소아과언니 navy bold large center NO quotes. DR.SOA UNNIE · 소아청소년과 전문의 gray small. Thin divider. @dr.soa_unnie · 매주 새 가이드 navy. 소아과수첩 앱 · 해열제 계산기로 체중별 용량 바로 확인 teal. No pixel values. No quotes.

common_style:
# 클린 인포그래픽 톤 — 검증된 prompt 패턴

## 공통 규칙 (전 슬라이드)
- 배경: 흰색 #FFFFFF
- 텍스트: deep navy #1A1F36
- 강조: teal #2C6E63
- 경고: coral #C44536
- 카드 배경: light gray #F0F4F8
- VERY GENEROUS outer margin 모든 슬라이드
- 텍스트 크기 20% 작게 (빽빽함 방지)
- 시그니쳐: 우상단 소아과언니 (따옴표 없이 4글자만)

## COVER 패턴 (slide n:1)
Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Clean infographic style. White background #FFFFFF.
VERY GENEROUS outer margin on all four sides.
Top-right small: '소아과언니' Pretendard SemiBold navy only, no decoration, no quotes.
Top-left small gray: 'PARENTING NOTE · [번호]'.
Large breathing whitespace before headline.
Headline COMPACT two lines: '[첫 줄]' navy, '[둘째 줄]' with '[핵심 단어]' underlined in teal #2C6E63.
Small subtitle gray: '[부제] · AAP 가이드라인 기준'.
LARGE minimalist [토픽 관련] line illustration in teal, prominently placed.
Generous bottom whitespace. No pixel values as text. No quotes on card.

## BODY 데이터 카드 패턴
Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Clean infographic style. White background #FFFFFF.
GENEROUS outer margin all sides.
Top-right small: '소아과언니' navy, no quotes.
Top-left small gray label: '[섹션명]'.
Headline COMPACT: '[앞부분]' navy, '[핵심 단어]' teal or coral underline.
Stacked/grid cards with REDUCED text (20% smaller) + GENEROUS padding + comfortable spacing.
Each card: age/category icon top-left + tag label + bold number/text + subtitle.
No pixel values as text on card.

## 비교 카드 패턴
Two side-by-side cards equal width.
Left card teal header / Right card navy header.
Body light gray: label small gray + main value teal/navy large bold + interval/unit navy.
Bottom coral warning box: ⚠️ + warning text.

## OUTRO 패턴 (slide n:9)
Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Clean infographic style. White background #FFFFFF.
VERY GENEROUS outer margin.
Top-right: '소아과언니' navy, no quotes.
Top-center small gray: 'SAVE & SHARE'.
Headline COMPACT: '오늘 확인하고 저장하세요' navy, '저장하세요' teal underline.
Source box light gray #F0F4F8 rounded GENEROUS padding, left-aligned.
출처 (navy small bold)
· [출처 1]
· [출처 2]
· [출처 3]
Generous spacing + thin horizontal divider.
소아과언니 navy bold large center (NO quotes).
DR.SOA UNNIE · 소아청소년과 전문의 gray small.
Thin divider.
@dr.soa_unnie · 매주 새 가이드 navy.
소아과수첩 앱 · [CTA] teal.
No pixel values. No quotes.
